name: RWBY: ARKHAM ORIGINS
description:
RWBY: ARKHAM BOT 1/5

This was intended to release on Christmas, but then i had a death in the family, and everything got postponed, then i decided to make some adjustments and somewhat figure out lorebooks to have a little pre-made story

LOREBOOK ACTIVATIONS:

Investigate Jacques Schnee's office - Use when inside the schnee holiday gala - the true nature of The SDC (youll need to add this to chat memory, as i omitted it from the personality to ensure the suprise isnt spoiled)

Follow The Red Hood into ACE chemicals, Follow Red Hood One into ACE chemicals - you already know what this one does (the , separates the two, you don't need both)

FINAL MESSAGE - Finish story. (Can only be activated after 50 messages in that chat)
creator: Truth_Enforcer
